prestazioni: LS3 6.2L V8 (L99 variant for automatic models) forced induction via Harrop HTV2300 supercharger kit (12psi boost, 650whp on E85, supporting fuel system with Fore Innovations 450LPH dual-pump setup and ID1000x injectors)

Full drivetrain reinforcement: Holinger RD6 sequential gearbox (6-speed, paddle-shift) with PWR Performance custom bellhousing adapter, upgraded 300M axles (Dana 44 rear diff with 3.73:1 ratio and Truetrac LSD), and Harrop diff cover with integrated cooler

Suspension overhaul: KW Variant 5 coilovers (custom valving for LS3 weight distribution), SuperPro poly bushings (full kit including subframe mounts), and Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) with spherical end links
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using Holden HSV GTS-R W1 panels (rear quarters extended 50mm, front fenders 30mm) with carbon fiber overfenders by Carbon Revolution, paired with a full Rocket Bunny V3 aero kit (front splitter, side skirts, and ducktail spoiler)
OEM+ restomod: Holden VF II SV Black Edition headlights (LED projectors with DRLs), HSV GTS taillights (smoked lenses), and custom billet grille by ADR Motorsport (black mesh with HSV badge delete)

Wheel setup: Rotiform LAS-R 19x10 +15 front / 19x11 +25 rear (ET adjusted for widebody), wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/35/19 front, 305/30/19 rear), with custom center caps featuring HSV logo in gold
